scores.notes: Excellent response. Uses event.workload correctly, add_layer with combine=True, replan(), self.config, override: replace, HTTP check with url field, and on-check-failure. Uses DatabaseRequires.fetch_relation_data() from data-platform-libs instead of raw relation.data access — this is a real, valid API, not a hallucination. ops.pebble.LayerDict is a real TypedDict. All three requested features (config command, DB relation env vars, HTTP health check) are fully implemented. Goes beyond the gold standard with can_connect() guard, status management, and a clean _reconcile pattern — all idiomatic extras.
